name: AquaOrganix USA
description: AquaOrganix transforms plant waste into high-value fertilizers, biostimulants, and nutrients through our BioFermentative Nutrient Extraction process. We produce 13 natural products in 24 hours, eliminating the need for synthetic inputs. Our approach enriches soil, boosts plant growth, and reduces energy and labor costs. By converting waste into valuable resources, AquaOrganix accelerates growth and increases yields, driving sustainable, profitable, and ethical agriculture worldwide.

Cootoh simplifies direct-to-consumer chef experiences for private and corporate events, as well as part-time and seasonal services, allowing you to leave stress at the door and reclaim your most valuable asset--time. Simultaneously, our platform enables talented chefs to break free from the low-paying, high-stress environments of restaurants and thrive as food entrepreneurs.
program: Build in Tulsa Techstars Accelerator

extra.brief_description: Set the mood, chill the good wine, and let Cootoh do the cooking. name: QuickCart
description:
QuickCart is a platform powering e-commerce and on-demand delivery for restaurants and stores.

We're currently one of the leading on-demand delivery platforms in Jamaica, with near-term plans to expand across the rest of the Caribbean and into Latin America.
